untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'impulse move magnitude' and 'extremely strong' impulse moves, which require custom volatility/momentum thresholds not directly available in indicator set. Also requires identification of 'pullback/bounce in progress' as a pattern state, which cannot be reliably expressed using only price and standard indicators without custom pattern recognition logic.
translation_notes: Approximated using MACD histogram for impulse direction, ATR ratio for impulse strength dampening (smaller ATR suggests less extreme move), and RSI extremes to avoid climax conditions. Entry conditions use: (1) momentum continuation via MACD, (2) impulse not extreme via ATR compression, (3) RSI not in climax zone. Exit on trend break or RSI extremes. Parameters impulse_strength_threshold, pullback_countertrend_momentum_limit, and reversal_threshold_percent remain undefined due to signal ambiguity and require manual calibration.
